# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: istio-ingressgateway
spec:
  selector:
    app: istio-ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-rule
spec:
  gateways:
  - istio-ingressgateway
  hosts:
  - '*'
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: productpage.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 9080
    - destination:
        host: details.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 9080
    - destination:
        host: ratings.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 9080
    - destination:
        host: reviews.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 9080
